2008.issue: [S2008] Version 1.7.0 tagged as "latest" at npm is not signed with provenance. Trusted publishing is recommended.

5601.issue: [S5601] i18n directory "admin/i18n" uses long format ({lang}/translations.json). Consider migrating to short format ({lang}.json) using "npm run translate convert".

5605.issue: [W5605] i18n "admin/i18n" language "zh-cn" has 2 outdated key(s) not present in English: avgbw, lowpass

5612.issue: [W5612] "admin/jsonConfig.json/items/statesAccordion/items[6]" attribute "tooltip" uses key "negativeSeparateTooltip" which is not found in the English translation file at "admin/i18n/en".

0036.issue: [E0036] @alcalzone/release-script-plugin-manual-review 5.1.1 specified. 5.2.0 is required as minimum,  5.2.0 (or newer) is current. Please update devDependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/BenAhrdt/ioBroker.smoothed/blob/master/package.json)

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.9.1" at [package.json](https://github.com/BenAhrdt/ioBroker.smoothed/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 22. Downgrade to node.js 22.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
